textByHash.1dcd5ef6c7a84939f7494cd8c52d8f5f40492b74: Eve brought me back from the afterlife. She's a party lion, that one.
textByHash.2bd1719bf62d0bb238906e5e0f683c687b5b3943: No, dead as in I got stabbed and died.
textByHash.50edebff2335f9e7334506be9b317807cb11a226: I'm not sure how the magic works exactly. Only Eve knows that. All I know is that she usually does this every year.
textByHash.6ba7065c221a8669f0c63fe03074b65bf40765bc: And I was going to offer you a quick way there... what a shame.
textByHash.6d113a9dbf7a9bd40189f23a80214482ce11bb21: You could say that. I could always come back to haunt people, but that gets tedious after a while. I'd much rather enjoy my time here.
textByHash.9f0b212e7a0f7f70a3b1532012fcb9d32826d76a: While the afterlife is not that bad, I do sometimes miss some things from when I used to be alive. There's nothing quite like Eve's special brew.
textByHash.e72350cdb2706ab0ee3f7371b390b54ef0e8a731: She returns to the world of the living every year. That doesn't mean she has to go to Lumbridge Swamp every year.
textByHash.f03d332104c64c9c50a344dfe31f91333f829756: The only way I'd cause harm is if someone were to interrupt my enjoying this party.
textByHash.f0abed15b357da8d6a86d7ff569508d39c54c6ca: Not a lot. Most of it you'd have to see for yourself.
